subject: London Blog 16: Just another nut
body:
London Blog 16: Just another nut (due to privacy I won't post on wordpress)

THE DEVIL WEARS PRADA / TWO WEEKS NOTICE
After 18 months in London I finally landed a permanent job! I was made
permanent after 5 weeks temping at the brokerage firm.

You know the saying: 'Be careful what you wish for.' I got what I wished
for: When my boss said he was immediately going to request a company
Blackberry for me since the night before he had been unable to get in touch
with me, I saw my life flash before my eyes. Anne Hathaway's character in
The Devil Wears Prada and Sandra Bullock's in Two Weeks Notice came to mind.

However, I've finally found the right place for me to work: A place where
people are extremely extroverted and sociable. Here I'm just another nut in
a bag of mixed nuts. I will never be the loudest or the craziest! Please
read on...

WHAT I HAVE TO DEAL WITH ON A DAILY BASIS (excerpts from articles)
"Fascinating details of the everyday habits of the City's finest money
brokers continue to emerge from the high court dispute between Cantor
Fitzgerald and rival firm Icap. On the stand yesterday was Mr B, who worked
at Cantor before moving to Icap. Describing his time at Cantor, Mr B
recalls in his witness statement an encounter with his boss, Mr A. "I
greeted him by slapping him playfully on the back twice ... Mr A lost his
temper and hit me hard on the back and then on the arm. He then licked his
fingers and wiped them on my neck." What a delightful bunch they all sound."

"An email doing the rounds of the trading floors provides further
explanations for some of the commonplace accounting acronyms of recent
times. EBIT, the waggish message suggests, should stand for "Earnings
Before Irregularities and Tampering"; EBITDA, meanwhile, has been recast
"Earnings Before I Tricked Da Auditor"; NAV becomes "Normal Andersen
Valuation"; and EPS has been redubbed "Eventual Prison Sentence"."

BETTER THAN MATCH.COM?
I thought being on a trading floor with +630 men and less than 20 women
would be awesome from a dating standpoint, but no... Brokers are one step
above gorillas...

Thank you all for reading!

Cecilia


UK Mobile: +44 ███ ██ ███ █████
